title: Math Connections
description: Connect blocks of numbers in high-octane speed challenges!
instructions: Connect blocks of numbers in high-octane speed challenges!

title: Focus and Precision
description: Trace the paths with absolute concentration and guide your vehicle safely.
instructions: Hold and drag along the line carefully to guide the cat racer through winding curves.

title: Spatial Reasoning
description: Test your geometry and angles in this high-speed diagonal jumping puzzle.
instructions: Tap and hold Space or Click to drift right. Double-jump at the blue checkpoints to pass obstacles.

title: Problem Solving
description: Gather keys and shield block items in this mysterious underground dungeon run.
instructions: Dodge guards, slide under gates, collect the gold keys, and clear the dungeon block.

title: Problem Solving
description: Guide your block karts to solve intense mechanical grid puzzle layouts.
instructions: Rotate switches, align lock blocks, and guide your kart to trigger the green gate portals.

title: Spatial Reasoning
description: Launch your logic forward in Use Your Head Part 3, testing gravity, speed, and timing.
instructions: Propel the elastic block head to hit the target button. Control velocity and wall rebounds.

title: Coordination
description: Classic Rodha platformer where you hop across triggers, spikes, and rotating lines.
instructions: Press A/D or Left/Right Arrow keys to jump side to side. Avoid dangerous gears, triggers, and spiked wheels.

title: Focus and Precision
description: Help the bouncing ball jump and slide to reach the security goal in Glitch.
instructions: Bounce through static spikes, slide down moving walls, and time your jump perfectly.

title: Focus and Precision
description: Control the swinging, bouncy ball and fly over platforms in Rodha Bounce.
instructions: Tap left/right arrow buttons to swing and roll. Launch high off bounce pads to reach the flags.

title: Spatial Reasoning
description: Guide duck life runners across elevated logic panels and obstacles.
instructions: Steer and lean the motorcycle racer precisely over loops and ramps inside the logic course.

title: Problem Solving
description: Slide and feed the purple math monster to clear numbers in Monsterland.
instructions: Maneuver, collect coins, and solve quick subtraction blocks before time runs empty.

title: Problem Solving
description: Bounce and solve cheese path logic problems with agile ninja hamsters.
instructions: Launch explosive cookies or cheese blocks to throw the hamster into the portal.
